## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -x`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented below)
